---
title: "12 Calibration (The Optimization)"
---

## 12.1 Method
-   Rscripts/tools
-   simulation period

## 12.2 Target Data
-   observed data 
-   Optimization Workflows - (corresponding with 'real world' observations)

## 12.3 Evaluation

-   Objective Functions and Performance Metrics
-   The challenge of equifinality

#
